title: Pentagon boss claims Iran now has ‘no navy, no navy leader’
text: {"source": "al_jazeera", "title": "Pentagon boss claims Iran now has 'no navy, no navy leader'", "text": "Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has said that Iran war is 'stuff for the history books'.", "url": "https://www.aljazeera.com/video/newsfeed/2026/3/26/pentagon-boss-claims-iran-now-has-no-navy-no-navy?traffic_source=rss", "timestamp": "Thu, 26 Mar 2026 16:33:18 +0000", "sentiment_score": 0.15, "rewrites": 0}

title: French court hands Islam scholar Tariq Ramadan 18-year jail term for rape
text: {"source": "bbc_world", "title": "French court hands Islam scholar Tariq Ramadan 18-year jail term for rape", "text": "Ramadan, a 63-year-old former Oxford professor, denied the charges but his lawyers said he was too ill to attend the trial.", "url": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj408984v2xo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss", "timestamp": "Thu, 26 Mar 2026 14:31:23 GMT", "sentiment_score": 0.15, "rewrites": 0}
